posts.author: evandroaraujo (Evandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using Monday Dev and made a few changes in Bugs board.

I need to ensure developers update a few fields when changing the status to specific statuses

Examples:

  • When Done, resolution is required
  • When Not a bug, resolution and comments to CS are required

I know I can set conditional format to show them what is missing, but this is not a solution. I can’t let them update the status without filling these fields.
